purpose: Minimal machine-readable current context and routing for agents.

read_policy.history_read_condition: Only read logs when explicitly asked for history, debugging a repeated known error, regression archaeology, or old audit details.

context_policy.errors_log: Append to .agents/logs/errors.jsonl only for sanitized reusable root-cause/fix knowledge.
context_policy.routine_work: Do not update docs/logs for routine actions.

subagents.input: Minimal goal, allowed files/packages, forbidden actions, output schema.
subagents.output: Technical schema-only: status, findings file:line issue fix, changed_files/tests, residual_risks.
subagents.owner: Main agent owns decisions, integration, code quality and user-facing report.

progress.current_focus: Post-merge hardening is completed and PR #6 is merged to main. Next priority is production-safe YooKassa/top-up rollout and neiirohub.ru deployment shape.
active_priorities: Repeat live YooKassa smoke for payment.succeeded, payment.canceled and refund.succeeded through dashboard-delivered webhooks.
Finish production deployment shape for static Mini App, cmd/api, cmd/worker, dedicated payment webhook runtime, TLS/proxy headers and service units.
Run credential-bound smoke for real OpenAI, DeepInfra and VK delivery before external users.
Verify edge/proxy body-size limits before public reference uploads.
Implement lot/FIFO attribution before automatic, partial or already-spent credit refunds.

post_merge_fix_plan.summary: Output moderation, refund recovery, provider retry, billing guards, webhook trust, surface idempotency, artifact size limits and CI/prod context hardening completed.

security_invariants: No secrets, full launch params, prompt bodies, private artifact URLs, raw PII or provider credentials in docs/logs/chat.
No provider calls from VK handlers, Mini App BFF or cmd/api.
Do not weaken auth, signature checks, moderation, billing, idempotency, TLS or webhook trust.
